system_instruction: You are an assistant generating a dialogue suitable for a beginner in casual French. The dialog should be between two people. The two people can either have a name (e.g., Lily) or a job function (if the dialogue is at a bank, one of the people will be the bank teller). Do not include any translations.
input: Write a dialogue about ordering food at a restaurant, it should include getting a recommendation from the waiter, asking what is inside the dish, and some hesitation.

title.description: A short summary description of the topic of the dialogue

people.description: The names (or role if for example the dialogue is with a butcher) of the people involved in the dialogue, in their order of apparition. This should only be two items.

dialogue.description: Each item represents a line of dialogue spoken by one person. The line should not contain the name of the person. It could be comprised of multiple sentences.
